Bash(./venv/bin/python3 -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, ''..''\)
from app.services.sc_executor import ScriptExecutor
from pathlib import Path

try:
    executor = ScriptExecutor\(base_dir=Path\(''..''\)\)
    print\(''Testing script executor...''\)
    result = executor.run_songs\(1\)  # Just 1 hour for quick test
    print\(f''✓ Success! Found {len\(result.get\(""songs"", []\)\)} songs''\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f''✗ Error: {e}''\)
    import traceback
    traceback.print_exc\(\)
")
